name: ndollem-docs-tools
description: Marketplace for documentation tooling — generate, sync, and audit project docs with Claude Code.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Documentation init/update/check skills — bootstrap, sync, and audit project docs from the codebase. init also writes a CLAUDE.md that imports AGENTS.md so Claude Code loads it; existing files are never overwritten. All three commands appear in the / menu; init and update confirm before writing files (use --yes to skip).
